metadata.title: Callout Suggestions
metadata.description: Adds a fuzzy searched suggestion modal for callouts.

regex.source: Notice("Callout Suggestions depends on Callout Manager. Install and enable it from community plugins before enablng this.")
regex.target: Notice("Callout Suggestions 插件依赖于 Callout Manager插件. 在启用此功能之前，请从社区插件中安装并启用它。")

regex.source: .log("Callout Suggestions depends on Callout Manager. Install and enable it from community plugins before enabling this.")
regex.target: .log("Callout Suggestions 插件依赖于 Callout Manager插件. 在启用此功能之前，请从社区插件中安装并启用它。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Which character should trigger the in-line suggestions?")
.setDesc("Select the case for the inserted callout")
